issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases beyond basic examples.
The skill assumes a Node.js environment for tooling, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: Generate TypeScript types from openapi.yaml
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for class-based codegen tools like openapi-typescript-codegen and misses the paths-indexed type pattern, while treatment uses the documented npx openapi-typescript invocation plus paths['...']['get']['responses'] indexing.

scenarios.name: Lint and preview docs locally
scenarios.rationale: Baseline suggests Spectral or swagger-cli without preview, while treatment uses the documented npx @redocly/cli lint and preview-docs commands directly.
